getActiveProvider() has a 5s cache TTL. Tests switching provider must wait >5s before asserting.

in_progress.title: [OPERATOR — CYCLE 17 — OVERDUE/CRITICAL] Fix observer-qa.yml skip bug
in_progress.manager_instruction: This is 2 cycles overdue. You must fix this NOW. Key diagnostic: Observer reports 3 runs fired in 2 seconds on d1c4781 — this is a duplicate on: trigger signature. Steps: (1) Open .github/workflows/observer-qa.yml. (2) Read the entire on: block. Look for duplicate push entries, or both push and workflow_dispatch both present where one satisfies a condition the other does not. (3) Check every job-level if: condition — does any reference github.event_name in a way that fails for one of the duplicate trigger types? (4) Check branches: and paths: filters — are they too narrow? (5) Fix: consolidate triggers, remove duplicates, ensure the QA job runs on push to main AND on workflow_dispatch with no restrictive if: on the job itself. (6) Push fix to main. (7) Confirm whether push auto-triggers or you need workflow_dispatch. Report run ID immediately in BUILD_LOG.md. Also confirm git ancestry: does HEAD descend from f9a925f? Any functional src/ changes? Log explicitly. This is your only task this cycle.
